cards.title: Range no one matches
cards.body: A performing arts centre and a blasted quarry face are different trades. We hold both: architectural GC credentials and a heavy civil fleet. Complex, mixed-scope projects stay under one contract.

cards.title: Self-performed
cards.body: Blasting, crushing, earthworks, concrete, electrical. Our forces, our equipment. One schedule, one point of accountability, no markup pyramid.

cards.title: Own the aggregate
cards.body: Spec material comes off our own crushers, not a supplier's price list. On remote and rural work, controlling the rock is controlling the job.

cards.title: Built for this province
cards.body: Two generations of Pittmans building through Newfoundland winters, coastal logistics, and long supply lines, anywhere in the province the work is. Remote isn't a risk factor here; it's the home field.
